Test.name: Stuf of doom
Test.ingredientsSummary: sugar, unbleached enriched flour (wheat flour, niacin, reduced iron, thiamine mononitrate [vitamin b1], riboflavin [vitamin b2], folic acid), palm oil, cocoa (processed with alkali), soybean and/or canola oil, cornstarch, high fructose corn syrup, baking soda, salt, soy lecithin, natural and artificial flavor (contains cinnamon), yellow 5, blue 1, chocolate, red 40 lake, blue 1 lake. contains: wheat, soy.
